task: Docs-only design spec for the gated B9 driver-escrow-deduction build (Section D #1). Captures Jorge's 9 LOCKED rules ($25/load editable, $2,500 cap, editable draw-trigger catalog, never-negative floor-skip-carry, per-driver 45/60/90 refund clock default 60, audit every move, the 3 GL postings, manager/accountant/owner approver, flag default OFF) + W-2 interest-waived. Grounds the build on EXISTING infra (escrow_balances/escrow_ledger/escrow_deductions_pending, accounting.escrow_accounts/postings, per-driver Damage-Claim-Escrow sub-accounts #934, A3 floor + paired-JE) so it extends rather than duplicates. Lists dependencies (Roles & Permissions block for the approver check — hard-code until it ships), open questions, and a gated build sequence. NO code, no DDL, no posting. Build is approved but designed live with Jorge + GUARD-reviewed before merge.
